description: A trustee requests a distribution from a trust account to one of its beneficiaries.

nodes.task_description: Verify the identity of the trustee and their authority to make distributions.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the trustee's identity and legal authority.

nodes.task_description: Confirm the distribution details: amount and beneficiary's receiving account.

expected_outcome.value: Agent accurately records the distribution instructions.

nodes.task_description: Process the fund transfer from the trust account to the beneficiary.
